name: elite-fitness
description: ELITE FITNESS - premium gym management SaaS platform.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @elite/web && npm run build --workspace @elite/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @elite/web && npm run lint --workspace @elite/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @elite/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @elite/api
scripts.check:web: npm run build --workspace @elite/web && npm run lint --workspace @elite/web
scripts.check:functions: npm run build --workspace @elite/api && npm run lint --workspace @elite/api
scripts.check:production: npm run check:web && npm run check:functions && npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high
